title: lycopodium clavatum subsp. contiguum
intro: Lycopodium clavatum subsp. contiguum, commonly known as club moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum subsp. contiguum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
